india_trends.title: Bitcoin holds near $75,000 as ETF inflows support price amid geopolitical uncertainty
india_trends.summary: Bitcoin hovered around $75,000 on Thursday. Markets watched for developments in the U.S.-Iran conflict. Cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum saw gains. Institutional demand provided support, with Bitcoin spot ETFs recording significant inflows. The $75,000 level remains a key resistance point.

india_trends.title: Om Power Transmission IPO listing tomorrow: Here’s what GMP hints ahead of debut
india_trends.summary: Om Power Transmission IPO price band is ₹166-175, with subscriptions from April 9 to 13. The company seeks to raise ₹150 crore, focusing on machinery purchases and debt repayment, with shares expected to list on April 17.
